testcase.classname: Clicking on ask ganesha icon functionality
testcase.name: Clicking on ask ganesha icon

testcase.classname: Verify Login functionality on askganesha application
testcase.name: Sign up for free by using dont have an account link
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the home page.................................................passed When I click on Login page and verify the login page appears................passed Then I click on Dont have an account link...................................passed And I am on the home page...................................................passed

testcase.classname: Verify Login functionality on askganesha application
testcase.name: Try to sign in using invalid password
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the home page.................................................passed When I click on Login page and verify the login page appears................passed And i enter valid email and invalid password................................passed Then I verify the error message appears.....................................passed And I click on the close button of error message............................passed

testcase.classname: Verify Login functionality on askganesha application
testcase.name: Verify the functionality of free sign up link - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the home page.................................................passed When I click on Login page and verify the login page appears................passed And I click on Sign up for free link........................................passed Then I enter "Full Name", "Email", "Password", "Confirm Password" and "Phone Number".passed And i click on Sign up button...............................................passed And i get a message of Email being registered successfully..................passed And I click on ask ganesha icon.............................................passed

testcase.classname: Verify Login functionality on askganesha application
testcase.name: Try to sign in using valid username and password
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the home page.................................................passed When I click on Login page and verify the login page appears................passed And i enter valid email and valid password..................................passed Then I verify the user is able to login successfully........................passed

testcase.classname: Verify the functionalitty of Love icon and associated pages on Ask Ganesha site
testcase.name: Verify the fuunctionality of clicking the Love icon on the home page

testcase.classname: Verify the functionalitty of Love icon and associated pages on Ask Ganesha site
testcase.name: Verify the functionality of clicking the Ask a question Love image on the Love page
testcase.system-out: Given I click on Askaquestiononlove image...................................passed Then I verify the Ask a question on love page appears.......................passed And I navigate back to love page............................................passed

testcase.classname: Verify the functionalitty of Love icon and associated pages on Ask Ganesha site
testcase.name: Verify the functionality of clicking the Ask a question on Love link on the Love page
testcase.system-out: Given I click on Ask a question on Love link................................passed Then I verify the Ask a question on love page appears.......................passed And the select option section is displayed..................................passed And Order report button is displayed........................................passed And I verify the list of questions is displayed.............................passed And I navigate back to love page............................................passed

testcase.classname: Verify the functionalitty of Love icon and associated pages on Ask Ganesha site
testcase.name: Verify the functionality of clicking the Ask a question service link on love page
testcase.system-out: Given I click on Ask a question service link on love page...................passed Then I verify the Ask a question on love page appears.......................passed And the select option section is displayed..................................passed And Order report button is displayed........................................passed And I verify the list of questions is displayed.............................passed And I navigate back to love page............................................passed

testcase.classname: Verify the functionalitty of Love icon and associated pages on Ask Ganesha site
testcase.name: Verify the functionality of clicking Read More on Ask a question on Love section on love page
testcase.system-out: Given I click on Read More button in Ask a question on Love section on love page.passed Then I verify the Ask a question on love page appears.......................passed And the select option section is displayed..................................passed And Order report button is displayed........................................passed Then I verify the list of questions is displayed............................passed And I navigate back to love page............................................passed

testcase.classname: Verify the functionalitty of Love icon and associated pages on Ask Ganesha site
testcase.name: Verify the functionality of directly entering the love prediction page url
testcase.system-out: Given I enter the direct url for landing to the love prediction page........passed Then I verify the Ask a question on love page appears.......................passed And the select option section is displayed..................................passed And Order report button is displayed........................................passed And I verify the list of questions is displayed.............................passed And I navigate back to love page............................................passed
